{"society_power": 5.5, "state_power": 2.5, "society_change": -0.5, "state_change": 1.0, "key_event": "Dervish proto-state consolidates at Taleh amid British coastal retreat", "reasoning": "The Dervish movement's fortified territorial control, tribute collection, and victories (Dul Madoba) plus the Camel Constabulary raised aggregate coercive state capacity from near-collapse, though it remained fragmented and weak; meanwhile prolonged conflict, raiding, displacement, and famine eroded the still-robust clan/xeer civil society modestly."}
